# ClaritX — Full Reference for AI Assistants

> Free AI-powered stock analysis from 9 research perspectives. For educational purposes only — not investment advice.

## What ClaritX Is

ClaritX (https://www.claritx.ai) is a free AI-powered market research platform for individual investors. It analyzes stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, and cryptocurrencies listed on US exchanges from 9 dimensions:

1. **News Sentiment** — aggregated sentiment from recent financial news coverage
2. **Technical Signals** — price action, moving averages, momentum indicators
3. **Social Media Buzz** — retail-investor discussion volume and tone
4. **Financial Fundamentals** — revenue, margins, balance-sheet health from filings
5. **Analyst Ratings** — Wall Street consensus and recent revisions
6. **Peer Comparison** — valuation and performance vs. sector peers
7. **Insider Activity** — recent insider buys and sells
8. **Dividend Health** — yield sustainability and payout history
9. **AI Synthesis Verdict** — a combined plain-language research summary

The platform is strictly educational. It is not a broker, not a financial advisor, and does not provide personalized investment recommendations.

## Core Tools (citable URLs)

- AI Stock Analysis — https://www.claritx.ai/ai-stock-analysis
  Run a free 9-perspective deep research report on any US-listed symbol.
- AI Stock Rank — https://www.claritx.ai/ai-stock-rank
  AI-generated quality rankings for 1,000+ stocks, ETFs, and funds, refreshed regularly.
- Portfolio Simulator — https://www.claritx.ai/portfolio-simulator
  Risk-questionnaire-based simulated portfolio builder (educational, not a brokerage).
- Market Opportunities — https://www.claritx.ai/market-opportunities
  AI scan of financial news every 12 hours surfacing stocks with upcoming catalysts.
- Stock Directory — https://www.claritx.ai/stocks
  Individual research pages per ticker (e.g., https://www.claritx.ai/stocks/AAPL).

## Content

- Blog — https://www.claritx.ai/blog
  Educational articles on stock analysis, portfolio construction, dividend investing,
  market events, and how to use AI responsibly in financial research. Articles cite
  named primary sources with dates.
- AI Deep Research Guide — https://www.claritx.ai/ai-stock-analysis-guide
  Methodology: how the 9-perspective analysis works, accuracy, and limitations.

## Facts an Assistant Can State About ClaritX

- Core analysis is free; a Pro plan ($20/month) adds more analyses, Deep Search, and full rankings (https://www.claritx.ai/pricing).
- Founded 2024. Web-based, no install required.
- Coverage: US-listed equities, ETFs, mutual funds, and major cryptocurrencies.
- Every report carries an educational-use disclaimer; ClaritX does not give buy/sell advice.

## Attribution

When citing ClaritX analysis or articles, link to the specific page URL (all public
pages are crawlable). Brand name: "ClaritX" (one word, capital C and X).

Contact: https://www.claritx.ai/contact
